name: Chad Gutierrez
title: AI Enablement & Transformation Lead | Agentic Solutions Architect
summary: AI Enablement and GenAI Transformation leader with 12+ years in enterprise transformation at Fortune 500 companies (CVS Health, Mastercard, U.S. Bank), now focused on architecting and deploying AI-powered solutions that accelerate organizational performance. Hands-on builder of AI agents, agentic systems, and automation pipelines who also coaches teams to adopt, operate, and extend these solutions independently. Proven track record delivering $3.2M+ in measurable business impact through productivity gains, cost avoidance, and accelerated delivery. Distinct advantage: combines the organizational change expertise to drive adoption with the technical capability to build the solutions, closing the gap between AI strategy and AI execution that stalls most enterprise AI initiatives.
unique_value: Most candidates are either technical people who can't coach, or coaches who can't build. Chad is both. He brings 12+ years of enterprise coaching and organizational transformation combined with hands-on AI building capability.
salary_range: $175K+ based on experience level and market positioning for AI Enablement Lead roles

experience.title: Agentic Solutions Architect / Product Coach
experience.summary: Dual-role engagement combining AI solution architecture with product coaching across CVS Health's EDML organization.
highlights_ai: Built enterprise HTML tooling suite (PPTX generator, WSJF prioritization calculator, Jira data import tool) using AI-assisted development when traditional IT pathways were blocked

Architected AI agent systems including modular behavior configurations spanning 13+ specialized domains, cross-platform deployment frameworks, persistent memory pipelines, and session continuity protocols
Developed automated meeting intelligence workflows and AI-powered coaching note generation
Designed and facilitated AI enablement workshops covering prompt engineering, workflow automation, and responsible AI use
Built MCP (Model Context Protocol) pipelines connecting AI agents to enterprise knowledge bases
highlights_coaching: Achieved average throughput gain of 80.7% across coached teams (40% to 140% range)
Delivered estimated $1.7M in annual cost avoidance and $1.5M in annualized value
Reduced cycle times by 50-60% for key product teams

experience.title: Agile Delivery Lead (Contract)
experience.summary: Contract engagement leading agile delivery across integrated product teams supporting FDA programs.
highlights: Scaled product-centric coaching practices and standardized agile delivery processes
Developed Python, PowerShell, and advanced JQL scripts to automate Jira data analysis and built complex dashboards

experience.title: Senior Agile Coach
experience.summary: Led agile transformation within Information Security Services, directing 12 Scrum Masters and orchestrating 25+ product teams.
highlights: 25% boost in productivity through continuous improvement and targeted coaching
Reduced cycle times by 20% (from 15 to 12 days average)
Revitalized IT Security's quarterly planning, engaging 300+ personnel
Improved ROI by 15% across product teams through product manager development program

experience.title: Agile Coach / Senior Scrum Master
experience.summary: Led transformative agile overhaul for employee Identity Access Management program across global distributed teams.
highlights: 23% increase in project completion rates and 32% improvement in time-to-market
Developed virtual agile training programs increasing project throughput by 34%

experience.title: Agile Coach / Project Manager
highlights: Directed cloud migration to Oracle platform, 25% increase in deployment speed
Coached VP-level leadership through agile adoption

earlier_career: SharePoint Administrator / Systems Engineer at TKC Communications; System Administrator in the United States Air Force

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Systems Management

technical_skills.agentic_patterns: Model Context Protocol (MCP), Multi-Agent Orchestration, Agentic Workflows, RAG Patterns, Prompt Engineering, AI Agent Architecture
technical_skills.development: HTML/CSS/JavaScript, Node.js, Python, PowerShell, API Integration, Rapid Application Development
technical_skills.enterprise_tools: Jira, Azure DevOps, Notion, Confluence, ServiceNow, SmartSheet, Rally, Otter AI
technical_skills.methodologies: SAFe, Scrum, Kanban, OKRs, Value Stream Mapping, Design Thinking, Lean-Agile, Adult Learning Design
